description: Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — Paper Tiger (PAPERTIGER) draws from the Chinese idiom “zhǐ lǎohǔ” describing something or someone that appears powerful or threatening but is actually weak or ineffective. PAPERTIGER delivers its holders, traders, and users instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability, making it a high-velocity, superior digital asset worldwide.
name: Paper Tiger
